title: Worktree header component with commit/push/PR functionality
purpose: Displays worktree branch information, dirty status, and provides controls for committing, pushing, and opening pull requests. Shows a diff viewer and modal for commit/push/PR actions.
module_context: Exports a React functional component WorktreeHeader that receives a session ID prop and manages state for modal and diff visibility. Uses agent store hooks for worktree data and session management.

steps.content: Extract worktree, dirty status, commit in flight status, and multi-session data from the agent store.
Initialize state for modal and diff visibility.
Get the commitPushPR function from the agent session hook.
Build a list of worktrees from the multi-session data.
Return null if no worktree exists or if it's a non-git worktree.
Render the header with branch name, dirty indicator, worktree switcher, diff button, PR status badge, and commit/push/PR button.
Conditionally render the diff viewer modal when diff is open.
Render the commit/push/PR modal with the appropriate handlers.

methods.name: worktrees
methods.normalized_params: (): { sessionId: string; path: string; branch?: string }[]

steps.content: Map over the multi-session sessions to extract session information.
Transform each session into an object with sessionId, path, and branch properties.
Use the session name as path when path is not available.
